requirement_topic.en: EMC and Harmonics — IEC 62920 / IEC 61000 Evidence for 60 Hz Dominican Grid Use
requirement_topic.zh: EMC及谐波——多米尼加60 Hz电网使用的IEC 62920 / IEC 61000证据
requirement_topic.zht: EMC及諧波——多明尼加60 Hz電網使用的IEC 62920 / IEC 61000證據

summary.en: PV inverter EMC evidence for the Dominican Republic should be prepared around IEC-family documentation commonly used for power-conversion equipment, including IEC 62920 for PV power conversion equipment EMC and relevant IEC 61000-series harmonic, immunity, and emission tests. Because the Dominican Republic grid is 60 Hz and commonly 120/240 V at low voltage, EMC and harmonic files should identify the tested voltage/frequency configuration and confirm whether additional evaluation is needed when the original report was generated under China 50 Hz / 220-380 V settings.
summary.zh: 多米尼加共和国光伏逆变器EMC证据应围绕功率变换设备常用的IEC体系文件准备，包括光伏功率变换设备EMC的IEC 62920，以及相关IEC 61000系列谐波、抗扰度和发射测试。由于多米尼加共和国电网为60 Hz且低压通常为120/240 V，EMC和谐波文件应说明测试电压/频率配置，并确认原报告若基于中国50 Hz / 220-380 V参数生成，是否需要补充评估。
summary.zht: 多明尼加共和國光伏逆變器EMC證據應圍繞功率轉換設備常用的IEC體系文件準備，包括光伏功率轉換設備EMC的IEC 62920，以及相關IEC 61000系列諧波、抗擾度和發射測試。由於多明尼加共和國電網為60 Hz且低壓通常為120/240 V，EMC和諧波文件應說明測試電壓/頻率配置，並確認原報告若基於中國50 Hz / 220-380 V參數生成，是否需要補充評估。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62920 — Photovoltaic power generating systems — EMC requirements and test methods for power conversion equipment
IEC 61000 series — Electromagnetic compatibility emission, immunity, and harmonic-current standards
INDOCAL/NORDOM standards and conformity context where adopted or required for the project

summary.en: China PV inverter EMC files are commonly based on GB/T 37408 and domestic laboratory reports. While those reports may include IEC 61000-family test methods, they are not automatically Dominican Republic EMC evidence unless the accepted standard, edition, limits, model coverage, and 60 Hz / 120-240 V configuration are clear to INDOCAL, SIE, the distributor, and the project owner.
summary.zh: 中国光伏逆变器EMC文件通常基于GB/T 37408及国内实验室报告。尽管这些报告可能包含IEC 61000体系测试方法，但除非INDOCAL、SIE、配电公司和项目业主可明确接受的标准、版本、限值、型号覆盖范围及60 Hz / 120-240 V配置，否则不能自动构成多米尼加共和国EMC证据。
summary.zht: 中國光伏逆變器EMC文件通常基於GB/T 37408及國內實驗室報告。儘管這些報告可能包含IEC 61000體系測試方法，但除非INDOCAL、SIE、配電公司和項目業主可明確接受的標準、版本、限值、型號覆蓋範圍及60 Hz / 120-240 V配置，否則不能自動構成多明尼加共和國EMC證據。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 37408-2021 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
NB/T 32004 — 光伏并网逆变器技术规范 (Technical Specification for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)

gap.en: Gap: A Chinese EMC certificate that does not identify IEC 62920 / applicable IEC 61000 clauses, model-family coverage, and 60 Hz operating configuration may not be enough for a Dominican Republic PV project file. Exporters should prepare IEC EMC reports, harmonic-current evidence, test configuration notes, and a mapping from the China report to the Dominican inverter firmware and nameplate configuration.
gap.zh: 差距：若中国EMC证书未说明IEC 62920 / 适用IEC 61000条款、型号系列覆盖范围及60 Hz运行配置，可能不足以支持多米尼加共和国光伏项目文件。出口商应准备IEC EMC报告、谐波电流证据、测试配置说明，以及从中国报告到多米尼加逆变器固件和铭牌配置的映射。
gap.zht: 差距：若中國EMC證書未說明IEC 62920 / 適用IEC 61000條款、型號系列覆蓋範圍及60 Hz運行配置，可能不足以支持多明尼加共和國光伏項目文件。出口商應準備IEC EMC報告、諧波電流證據、測試配置說明，以及從中國報告到多明尼加逆變器韌體和銘牌配置的映射。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory in practice where INDOCAL/NORDOM conformity, SIE/distributor interconnection, or project-owner specifications call for IEC EMC and harmonic evidence
mandatory_status.cn: Chinese GB/T EMC evidence is domestic support evidence and is not automatically accepted for Dominican Republic project review

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Do not rely on a China-only GB/T 37408 EMC file without checking IEC 62920 / IEC 61000 coverage and the Dominican 60 Hz / 120-240 V operating configuration. Confirm current INDOCAL, SIE, distributor, and project-owner EMC evidence expectations before final submission.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 不应在未核查IEC 62920 / IEC 61000覆盖范围及多米尼加60 Hz / 120-240 V运行配置的情况下，仅依赖中国GB/T 37408 EMC文件。最终提交前，请确认INDOCAL、SIE、配电公司和项目业主当前对EMC证据的要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 不應在未核查IEC 62920 / IEC 61000覆蓋範圍及多明尼加60 Hz / 120-240 V運行配置的情況下，僅依賴中國GB/T 37408 EMC文件。最終提交前，請確認INDOCAL、SIE、配電公司和項目業主當前對EMC證據的要求。
